actions.intent: Open the lower rescue route and break the left crate near the most threatened puppy.
Clear the central route tax and bring the lower and middle puppies to one-clear-away.
Open the top target's right side while carrying manageable dock residue.
Use a safe cleanup beat before committing to extraction clears.
Extract the lower puppy before water catches the route.
Cash the planned dock clear while extracting the middle and top puppies to win with the dock under control.

notes: Designer-approved dock capstone route: lower rescue, middle pivot, top final extraction.
